title: Does This Fit?
description: Clothing vocabulary + sizes + fitting rooms. Plus the difference between FIT (size) and SUIT (look good).
summary_pt_br: Roupas + tamanhos + provador. FIT (caber — tamanho) vs SUIT (combinar — estilo). 'These jeans FIT me' (caibo neles). 'This color SUITS you' (essa cor te combina).

turns.en: Do you have this in a medium?
Yes. The fitting rooms are over there.
These jeans don't fit. They're too tight.
turns.pt: Essa calça não cabe. Tá apertada.

turns.en: The blue shirt really suits you, though.
turns.pt: Mas a camisa azul fica ótima em você.

scenes.title: FIT vs SUIT
scenes.body_en: FIT = the right SIZE. 'These pants fit me.' (they're my size). SUIT = looks good / matches YOU. 'That color suits you.' (looks nice on you). Brazilians mix these — don't.
scenes.body_pt: FIT = CABE (tamanho). SUIT = FICA BEM (aparência). 'These pants fit' (cabem). 'This color suits you' (combina com você).

examples.en: Small size fits. Red color suits.

exercise.question: 'That shirt really ___ you.' (looks good on you)
